name: hermes-dev
description: Authoring kit for Hermes Agent (Nous Research's open-source autonomous agent harness — NOT the model family), current as of June 2026, Hermes Agent v0.16 'The Surface Release'. Owns the Hermes-specific half of extension development: skills (agentskills.io SKILL.md with the Hermes-required version field and metadata.hermes.* extras, the ~/.hermes/skills/<category>/ tree with its extra CATEGORY level, skills.external_dirs cross-tool sharing, skill bundles, hermes skills install + GitHub taps + /.well-known/skills endpoints, the install-time security scan, and machine edits via the autonomous skill_manage tool), Python plugins (plugin.yaml manifest + register(ctx) with register_tool/register_hook/register_command/register_skill, the args-dict-in/JSON-string-out/never-raise handler contract, pip entry points under hermes_agent.plugins, memory-provider and context-compression plugin types), and configuration (~/.hermes/config.yaml, SOUL.md/MEMORY.md/USER.md context files, auto-loaded .hermes.md/HERMES.md/AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/.cursorrules project context, mcp_servers stdio + HTTP/OAuth 2.1/mTLS wiring, hermes mcp serve, the 23-platform messaging gateway, Nous Portal's 300+ models, hermes claw migrate). Ships a deterministic lane: validate-hermes-artifact.sh checks plugin.yaml parse/fields/types, register(ctx) presence, SKILL.md frontmatter incl. the version field, metadata.hermes shape, config.yaml mcp_servers entries, and Python syntax, on the shared JSON finding contract. Hermes ships multiple minor releases per month — re-verify API specifics against current docs before shipping.
